user.title: Inkbird Irrigation Setup
user.description: Enter your Inkbird IIC-600 device credentials. You can get these from the Tuya IoT Platform (iot.tuya.com).

data_description.cloud_api_key: Tuya IoT Cloud Access ID, used only as a fallback when the local connection is unavailable.
data_description.cloud_api_region: Tuya datacenter region code (e.g. eu, us, cn, in).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device. Check IP, Device ID, and Local Key.
